description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline that has a velvetty in-seam, half sleeves and mildly distressed graphic print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments Wear your style on your tee with this black t-shirt from lee. The stylishly printed brand name across the left of the shirt in green against a black background enhances your style statement. Team this with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
